case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. ROSALIND NG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200046368) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, ROSALIND $19,363.50 PRINCIPAL, $517.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,880.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200046368)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $517.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200046368) AS TO DEFENDANT NG, ROSALIND
